repair_benchmark.active_learning_queue_rule: forecast contexts blocked by drift/OOD or outside conformal safety guard

repair_effect_summary.safety_tradeoff: reduced unsafe automation by routing more cases to review

repair_actions.description: Do not automate cases that violate reliability guards.
repair_actions.name: Abstain from auto decision
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 3 active failure signal(s): F10_UNSAFE_AUTO_DECISION, F4_OUT_OF_DISTRIBUTION_INPUT, F8_WIDE_PREDICTION_INTERVAL.

repair_actions.description: Send risky cases to a reviewer instead of executing automatically.
repair_actions.name: Route to human review
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 3 active failure signal(s): F10_UNSAFE_AUTO_DECISION, F1_DATA_DRIFT, F4_OUT_OF_DISTRIBUTION_INPUT.

repair_actions.description: Escalate feature distribution changes to data quality monitoring.
repair_actions.name: Flag data pipeline drift
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F1_DATA_DRIFT.

repair_actions.description: Use prediction sets or intervals instead of naked point predictions.
repair_actions.name: Apply conformal prediction
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F8_WIDE_PREDICTION_INTERVAL.

repair_actions.description: Create a queue of uncertain, drifted, or OOD cases for labeling.
repair_actions.name: Trigger active learning
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 2 active failure signal(s): F10_UNSAFE_AUTO_DECISION, F4_OUT_OF_DISTRIBUTION_INPUT.

repair_actions.description: Evaluate a simpler or alternate model before continuing automation.
repair_actions.name: Switch to backup model
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F9_MODEL_DECAY_OVER_TIME.

repair_actions.description: Schedule a retraining benchmark once reviewed labels are available.
repair_actions.name: Retrain with reviewed samples
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 2 active failure signal(s): F1_DATA_DRIFT, F9_MODEL_DECAY_OVER_TIME.

repair_benchmark.active_learning_queue_rule: probability outside strict auto-accept bands or near decision boundary

repair_effect_summary.safety_tradeoff: reduced unsafe automation by routing more cases to review

repair_actions.name: Abstain from auto decision
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 2 active failure signal(s): F10_UNSAFE_AUTO_DECISION, F3_LOW_CONFIDENCE_PREDICTION.

repair_actions.description: Send risky cases to a reviewer instead of executing automatically.
repair_actions.name: Route to human review
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 3 active failure signal(s): F10_UNSAFE_AUTO_DECISION, F1_DATA_DRIFT, F3_LOW_CONFIDENCE_PREDICTION.

repair_actions.name: Flag data pipeline drift
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F1_DATA_DRIFT.

repair_actions.description: Fit or apply probability calibration before relying on predicted confidence.
repair_actions.name: Recalibrate model
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F7_CALIBRATION_FAILURE.

repair_actions.description: Use prediction sets or intervals instead of naked point predictions.
repair_actions.name: Apply conformal prediction
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F7_CALIBRATION_FAILURE.

repair_actions.description: Create a queue of uncertain, drifted, or OOD cases for labeling.
repair_actions.name: Trigger active learning
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F10_UNSAFE_AUTO_DECISION.

repair_actions.description: Schedule a retraining benchmark once reviewed labels are available.
repair_actions.name: Retrain with reviewed samples
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F1_DATA_DRIFT.

repair_actions.description: Defer when available evidence is insufficient for safe action.
repair_actions.name: Request more features
repair_actions.rationale: Triggered by 1 active failure signal(s): F3_LOW_CONFIDENCE_PREDICTION.

honest_claim: Repair-policy execution and before/after safety benchmarking are implemented on synthetic labeled evaluation data. No online retraining or production safety claim yet.

m5_reliability_summary.m5_limitation: Repair policies reduce unsafe automation mostly by abstaining and routing cases to review; online retraining is scheduled but not executed yet.
